_comment: Bounded-context DEEP RESEARCH verify: LFM2.5-8B-A1B via Ollama + OpenClaw's documented best practice for tool-heavy long-horizon research (openclaw.context). Deliberately keeps contextWindow at 32768 (the size that overflowed at ~3 tool turns WITHOUT these settings) to prove the fix: openclaw.context turns on contextPruning (OFF by default for non-Anthropic backends — trims old tool results from the in-memory prompt), lowers the reserveTokensFloor (reclaims the 'contextWindow/2' budget), enables midTurnPrecheck (compacts after a tool result, before the next call — pre-empts the 'Already compacted' bug), caps per-tool-result chars, and points memory_search at a no-key BM25 provider. Run with examples/web_research_deep.json (6 steps / 4 accumulating web searches). See memory: openclaw-context-bestpractice.
